global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a prominent logo and engaging text.
global.main_message: Encouraging new players to join with rewards.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the entire background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere.

elements.label: PixelForge logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'PixelForge' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Decorative circles
elements.description: A cluster of four circular shapes with dark centers, arranged in a grid pattern, adding a playful element.

elements.label: Single decorative circle
elements.description: A single circular shape with a dark center, positioned within the cluster of circles.

elements.label: Additional decorative circles
elements.description: Another circular shape with a dark center, complementing the cluster of circles.

elements.label: Additional decorative circles
elements.description: A circular shape with a dark center, part of the decorative cluster.

elements.label: Additional decorative circles
elements.description: A circular shape with a dark center, contributing to the playful design.

elements.label: Arrow icon
elements.description: A small arrow icon pointing to the right, indicating a call to action or navigation.

elements.label: Decorative circle
elements.description: A circular shape with a dark center, positioned centrally within the ad.

elements.label: Small decorative circle
elements.description: A small circular shape with a dark center, located near the top of the ad.

elements.label: Small decorative circle
elements.description: A small circular shape with a dark center, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: Small decorative circle
elements.description: A small circular shape with a dark center, located near the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The text 'Level up today' is prominently displayed in a bold, white font, conveying excitement.
elements.text_content: Level up today Free rewards for new players

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: The text 'Free rewards for new players' is displayed below the main headline in a smaller font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Book now' in a bold font, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.
